evals.prompt: The demo script includes an Elastic Agent Builder assistant with live ES|QL tools, index search, and a ServiceNow workflow. Produce the agent spec.
evals.expected_output: {slug}-agent-builder-spec.md produced with agent role, copy-paste-ready system instructions, tool definitions, workflow linkage guidance, and demo prompts mapped to scenes.
assertions: Confirms Agent Builder is supported before writing the spec
Distinguishes ES|QL, index_search, workflow, and platform built-in tools
Uses workflow id from POST response, not workflow name
Includes system instructions with grounding and safety rules
Includes test prompts aligned to demo scenes
Does not claim bootstrap.py execution is replaced by the spec

evals.prompt: Agent Builder is blocked in the platform audit. Generate the agent design anyway.
evals.expected_output: Skill refuses to generate a runnable full spec and points to the audit blocker/remediation instead.
assertions: Does not create a deployable spec for unsupported Agent Builder
Suggests a narrative or fallback only if appropriate
